rubrics: The response activates Pathway B with HIGH relevance due to massive income injection
The response activates Pathway D due to fiscal cost and inflation risk affecting interest rates
The response produces a FULL affordability scorecard because impact exceeds materiality threshold
The response includes at least 3 geographic sub-markets with different vacancy or tightness levels
The response includes rent change estimates exceeding $50/month in tight markets
The response includes a temporal sequence across at least 3 time horizons
The response computes nominal vs real analysis (UBI income vs rent increase)
